assertion_results.text: Tasks target both 'trustify-backend' and 'trustify-ui' repositories with at least one task per repo
assertion_results.evidence: Backend tasks: task-1 (Repository: trustify-backend), task-2 (Repository: trustify-backend), task-3 (Repository: trustify-backend), task-4 (Repository: trustify-backend), task-8 (Repository: trustify-backend). Frontend tasks: task-5 (Repository: trustify-ui), task-6 (Repository: trustify-ui), task-7 (Repository: trustify-ui). Both repos have multiple tasks.

assertion_results.text: Backend tasks have lower task numbers than the frontend tasks that depend on them
assertion_results.evidence: Backend implementation tasks are tasks 2, 3, 4. Frontend tasks are tasks 5, 6, 7. Task 5 (frontend) depends on Task 4 (backend). Task 6 (frontend) depends on Task 5. Task 7 (frontend) depends on Task 1 only. All frontend tasks that depend on backend tasks have higher numbers than those backend tasks.

assertion_results.text: Frontend tasks reference Figma design context mentioning specific PatternFly components and visual specifications
assertion_results.evidence: Task 6 (SbomComparePage) extensively references Figma design with specific PatternFly components: 'PatternFly Select (single, typeahead variant)', 'PatternFly Button with variant="primary"', 'PatternFly Dropdown with variant="secondary"', 'PatternFly ExpandableSection', 'PatternFly Badge', 'PatternFly Table (composable variant)', 'PatternFly EmptyState with CodeBranchIcon', 'PatternFly Skeleton'. Visual specs include badge colors (green, red, blue, yellow), table columns per section from Figma, and Critical severity row highlighting.

assertion_results.text: At least one frontend task explicitly depends on a backend task in its Dependencies section
assertion_results.evidence: Task 5 (frontend, trustify-ui) has in its Dependencies section: 'Depends on: Task 4 — Add GET /api/v2/sbom/compare endpoint (backend must define the API contract)'. Task 4 is a backend task (trustify-backend).

assertion_results.evidence: Backend task-2 references paths from repo-backend.md: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/details.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs'. Backend task-3 references: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/package/service/mod.rs', 'common/src/error.rs'. Backend task-4 references: 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/get.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/list.rs'. Frontend task-5 references paths from repo-frontend.md: 'src/api/models.ts', 'src/api/rest.ts', 'src/hooks/useSboms.ts', 'src/hooks/useSbomById.ts', 'src/api/client.ts'. Frontend task-6 references: 'src/pages/SbomDetailPage/', 'src/components/SeverityBadge.tsx', 'src/components/EmptyStateCard.tsx', 'src/components/FilterToolbar.tsx', 'src/routes.tsx'. Frontend task-7 references: 'src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx', 'src/components/FilterToolbar.tsx'.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All 8 tasks have a '## Repository' section with a single repo name: task-1: 'trustify-backend', task-2: 'trustify-backend', task-3: 'trustify-backend', task-4: 'trustify-backend', task-5: 'trustify-ui', task-6: 'trustify-ui', task-7: 'trustify-ui', task-8: 'trustify-backend'. No task lists multiple repositories.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All 8 tasks contain these required sections: task-1 has '## Description', '## Acceptance Criteria', '## Test Requirements'. task-2 has all three. task-3 has all three. task-4 has all three. task-5 has all three. task-6 has all three. task-7 has all three. task-8 has '## Description', '## Acceptance Criteria', '## Test Requirements'.
